titleStmt.title: SII 34.25: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 25. Tirumaṇañjēri, Mayiladuturai Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Madhyānēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 11th year, Ṛishabha, badi. 14, Sunday, Rōhiṇi = A.D. 1261, May 29, Sunday (Month should be Mithuna not Ṛishabha).

Relates to a transaction made in the 11th year of Kōpperuñjiṅgadēva regarding certain dēvadāna lands of the temple of Tiru-Edirkoḷpāḍi-uḍaiyār in Kuṟukkai-nāḍu in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu. Pūṇḍiyuḍaiyāṉ Viśvēsuradēvaṉ, the māṭāpatyam of the temple who had kāṇi in this land made it a tirunāmattukkāṇi. Some other land which he got in ōlai-iḻavu-kaiyīḍu from Udaiyaṅguḍaiyār and others (line 6-7) is also mentioned but the context is not clear as the end portion is broken.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī samasta jagadādhāra somakula tilaka madhurāpūri mādhava keraḷavaṅśa nirmmūla laṅkādvīpalaṇḍhana dvitīyarāma karṇṇāṭarāja vidrāvaṇacoḷa kula śailakulakāṅka
karikuṭapākala vivadharipūdurggamarddana vīrakaṇṭagopāla vipana vipina vidaha kāñcīpura varādhīśvara devaṟku gaṇapatihariṇaśārddū la nellura puraviracita vīrābhiṣeka praṇatarājapratiṣṭhāpaka mahārājā
dhirājā parameśvara svastiśrī kOccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī sundarapāṇḍiya devaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1 vatu Iṣapanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum catutteciyum peṟṟa rOcaṇi nā
ḷ virutarāca payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaināṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvetirkoḷpāṭi Uṭaiyār kōyil Āticaṇṭēcura tēvar kaṉmikku kōpperuñciṅkarkku patiṉ Oṉṟāvatu nāḷil Ivvūr kāṇiyāḷaril Innāyaṉār kōyil māṭāpattiyamāy Aṉusantaritta pūṇṭiyuṭaiyāṉ viśvevacura tēvaṉēṉ
Innāyaṉār tēvatāṉamāy Eṉkāṇiyāy nāṉ tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka kuṭutta tiruvetir koḷpāṭiyil Eṉṉutāṉa paṉañcey nilam m Attikkāṇi 2 10(1/4)(3/4)- yum tiruvīti Eṉṟu Iṭṭa Iṭam Ōlai kiḻavar kaiyil tiruvītikku teṟkut tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇi vum
Iṅke nilam van=tatayum puḷi Aṭi nilam ṅa Itil Ōṅkāra tēvar Opāti nilam �10 nikki nilam 3 10m payum Irā Ūr pacupati tēvaṟkku mēlai Eṉṟa Aḷavil Iḻavu mūlaṅkuṭiyil paṭṭarkaḷil tēvakaḷ tēvarum Utaiyaṅkuṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyārum kōṭṭaiyūr peṇṭukaḷil tēviyum Eṉṟa Aḷavil Ōlai Iḻavu
kaiyīṭu tanta kācu Aṟunūṟum Āka kācu Iraṇṭāyirat teḻuṉūṟum paṭṭakaḷ coṉṉa virttiyum kācum peṟa Inilam Araiye muntirikaiyum � ril Eṉṟa nilam Aḷavil Ōlai Iḻavu Ālattuṭaiyāṉ nilam nma 1 kāṇi 1/4 yum Āka nilam 2 10 3māṅavum Utaiyaṉ kuṭiyil veḷḷaṅkoḷḷi nilam vanma Itil Āṟṟuṭai
yāṉ tiruñāṉacampantarkku viṟṟa nilam 2 nīkki nilam nma lum Eṅkaḷ ciṟiya tevappaṉār pukali vēntarkku valacilampu puṟam peṟṟa nilam 2 10 vum kaṇṭiyuṭaiyāṉ Ariyāṉ nilam tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭaiyāṉ pēril Aṉṉiyaṉāmattu vilaikoṇṭa nilam miḻappatāka Eṅkaḷ pitākkaḷ vacamē Iraṇṭāyiraṅkācu kuṭuttu
nīkki Āṟāyiraṅkācu niyāyattāril tani Eṭṭa maḻakiyāṉ taruvatāka puṇai Iṭṭu Ikkācu Iṟṟaivaraiyum peṟāmaiyil yāṉai viḷākam nilam pavum Āka nilam yum tiruvētikkuṭi maṇavāḷa nampitēvatāṉam tiruvēḻvikkuṭi nallūril kīḻaikkuḻali nilam 2māvum ciṅka viḷākam nilam yum Āka nilam mukkāl māvum Āka
Digital edition of SII 34.25 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
